_comment: Provenance manifest for golden test vectors (plan/M0-foundations.md M0.2, specs/02 §6.1). Vectors are produced by tools/extract-vectors/extract.go run against the pinned avalanchego revision below; per-surface schemas are documented in each <surface>/MANIFEST.md.

surfaces.crypto: committed — addr.json, encodings.json, secp.json, bls.json, nodeid.json, signer.key
surfaces.merkledb: committed — keys/key_pack.json, nodes/node_codec_encode.json, proofs/merkledb_proof.json, range-proofs/range_proof.json, roots/merkledb_root.json
surfaces.message: committed — app_request.json, chits.json, get.json, get_peerlist.json, handshake.json, peerlist.json, ping.json, ping_zero.json, pong.json, signed_ip.json
surfaces.saevm: committed — MANIFEST.json, atomic/*.bin, blocks/*.json, recovery/*, recovery_differential/*, settlement/*, streaming_differential/*

todo: crypto/nodeid.json: add the large_rsa_key REJECT cert (RSA-3072) for M0.20
crypto/encodings.json: add Json-encoding error cases if M0.17 needs them
